description: Calculate advanced baseball statistics (Sabermetrics) and create a leaderboard using the raw MLB batting data in /home/ga/Documents/batting_stats.xlsx. In the 'Raw_Data' sheet, calculate the following metrics for all players: 1B (H - 2B - 3B - HR), TB (1B + 2*2B + 3*3B + 4*HR), PA (AB + BB + HBP + SF), OBP ((H + BB + HBP) / PA), SLG (TB / AB), and OPS (OBP + SLG). Ensure OBP, SLG, and OPS are formatted to three decimal places and handle any division by zero errors. Create a new sheet named 'Qualified_Hitters' that includes the header and all players with at least 300 PA, sorted by OPS from highest to lowest. Highlight OPS values greater than 0.800 with a background color in the 'Qualified_Hitters' sheet. Save the changes to /home/ga/Documents/batting_stats.xlsx.
